sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96891" key="stleggidolh/kuqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στλεγγῐδο-λήκῠθος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the slave who carried his master's</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στλεγγίς</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">and</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λήκυθος</foreign> to the bath, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.154</biblScope> </bibl> (who censures the word).</sense> </entryFree>
